ItacPersonItem.Notes: Appointed `segretario ducale` in Venice in 1585, he was among the founders of the Accademia Veneziana. Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. Maggiolo (and before him Camillo Minieri Riccio, Memorie storiche degli scrittori nati nel Regno di Napoli, 1844), affirms that Scarano was member of the Accademia della Fama, but this might be a mistake, as Accademia veneziana were called both institutions. Other publications by Scarano bear the emeblem of the second Accademia Veneziana, and not that of the Accademia della Fama.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
